meta.note: Presentation/data only — mirrors on-chain achievement registrations. No chain writes. Same id + deed on both lines; only the name/lore differs (founder reskin 2026-06-27).
meta.reward: Every achievement pays 1% of its tier pool (BPS_OF_POOL, 100 bps), once per pawn (oneTimePerNFT), attested by the seas-watcher. Self-limiting — never a fixed promise.

attestLegend.live: The seas-watcher attests this deed automatically (job + guard shift time).
attestLegend.pending: Registered on-chain, but the watcher cannot attest it yet (ship-loyalty/versatility need continuous-crewing events). Shown for completeness — does not pay until wired.

civic.label: Civic — Gold
civic.blurb: Upstanding crew sworn to Port Royal. Honest deeds pay in GOLD.

rogue.label: Rogue — Black Coin
rogue.blurb: The Redrum Raiders and the dark side. Dark deeds pay in cbBTC.

civic.title: Signed On the Docks
civic.lore: Honest backs move Port Royal's cargo. Clock shifts on the haul crew and the docks learn your name.

rogue.title: Press-Ganged
rogue.lore: The Redrum crew hauls what it takes. Every crate dragged from a broken hold is one more for the black ledger.
